_meta.author: ravikatiyar162
_meta.title: Baggage Add-on
_meta.description: Additional Baggage Selection UI designed for flight or travel booking apps. It allows users to choose extra baggage weight options (5 kg, 10 kg, 15 kg) with clear pricing. The selected option is highlighted with a radio button and summarized below for quick confirmation. Simple icons, dark theme, and concise layout make it easy to review and decide. Ideal for airline apps, ticket booking platforms, or travel management systems.
